name: cannabis-platform
description: Unified cannabis demo suite monorepo (patient, driver, dispatch, medcard, secure call)

scripts.dev:core: concurrently -k -n patient,driver,dispatch -c magenta,cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w apps/patient-app" "npm run dev -w apps/driver-app" "npm run dev -w apps/dispatch-standalone"
scripts.dev:secure-call: concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/secure-call-server" "npm run dev -w apps/secure-call-web"
scripts.dev:medcard: concurrently -k -n medcard,signal,web,kiosk -c magenta,cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev -w apps/medcard-standalone" "npm run dev -w apps/secure-call-server" "npm run dev -w apps/secure-call-web" "npm run dev -w apps/kiosk"

author: Awakened Industries
